events.name: TILE_CLICK
events.description: --- Event handlers (legacy callbacks — prefer declarative event string props below) ---

overridableConfigKeys.label: Asset Manifest
overridableConfigKeys.description: --- Remote asset loading ---

overridableConfigKeys.label: Attack Targets
overridableConfigKeys.description: Attack target positions (shown as pulsing red highlights)

overridableConfigKeys.label: Background Image
overridableConfigKeys.description: Background image URL tiled behind the isometric grid

overridableConfigKeys.label: Board Height
overridableConfigKeys.description: Board height in tiles (overrides tile-derived size)

overridableConfigKeys.label: Board Width
overridableConfigKeys.description: Board width in tiles (overrides tile-derived size)

overridableConfigKeys.label: Class Name
overridableConfigKeys.description: Additional CSS classes

overridableConfigKeys.label: Debug
overridableConfigKeys.description: Show debug grid lines and coordinates

overridableConfigKeys.label: Diamond Top Y
overridableConfigKeys.description: Override for the diamond-top Y offset within the tile sprite (default: 374). This controls where the flat diamond face sits vertically inside the tile image.

overridableConfigKeys.label: Effect Sprite Urls
overridableConfigKeys.description: Additional sprite URLs to preload (e.g., effect sprites)

overridableConfigKeys.label: Effects
overridableConfigKeys.description: Active visual effects to draw after units. Sprite URLs resolved via assetManifest.effects[fx.key].

overridableConfigKeys.label: Enable Camera
overridableConfigKeys.description: Enable camera pan/zoom controls

overridableConfigKeys.label: Error
overridableConfigKeys.description: Error state

overridableConfigKeys.label: Features
overridableConfigKeys.description: Array of features (resources, portals, buildings, etc.)

overridableConfigKeys.label: Has Active Effects
overridableConfigKeys.description: Whether there are active effects — keeps RAF loop alive

overridableConfigKeys.label: Hovered Tile
overridableConfigKeys.description: Hovered tile position

overridableConfigKeys.label: Is Loading
overridableConfigKeys.description: Loading state indicator

overridableConfigKeys.label: Scale
overridableConfigKeys.description: Render scale (0.4 = 40% zoom)

overridableConfigKeys.label: Selected Unit Id
overridableConfigKeys.description: --- Interaction state ---

overridableConfigKeys.label: Show Minimap
overridableConfigKeys.description: Toggle minimap overlay

overridableConfigKeys.label: Sprite Height Ratio
overridableConfigKeys.description: Ratio of unit draw height to scaledFloorHeight. Default 1.5.

overridableConfigKeys.label: Sprite Max Width Ratio
overridableConfigKeys.description: Max unit draw width as a ratio of scaledTileWidth. Default 0.6.

overridableConfigKeys.label: Tile Layout
overridableConfigKeys.description: --- Rendering options ---

overridableConfigKeys.label: Tiles
overridableConfigKeys.description: --- Grid data ---

overridableConfigKeys.label: Unit Scale
overridableConfigKeys.description: Extra scale multiplier for unit draw size. 1 = default.

overridableConfigKeys.label: Units
overridableConfigKeys.description: Array of units on the board

overridableConfigKeys.label: Valid Moves
overridableConfigKeys.description: Valid move positions (shown as pulsing green highlights)
